# LPeg Vendor Record

## Source

- Project: LPeg - Parsing Expression Grammars For Lua
- Version: 1.1.0
- Source archive: https://www.inf.puc-rio.br/~roberto/lpeg/lpeg-1.1.0.tar.gz
- Upstream page: https://www.inf.puc-rio.br/~roberto/lpeg/

## License

- License text is included in `lpeg.html` under the `License` section.
- Copyright holder: Lua.org, PUC-Rio.
- License family: MIT/X11-style permissive license.

## Local Changes

- The upstream `lpeg-1.1.0` archive was copied into `third_party/lpeg/`.
- No source files were modified.
- This directory is intended for `native_modules` compatibility validation only; build and test scripts must use the repository's Lua 5.3 public headers from `native/lua53/include/` instead of system Lua development packages.
